title: Cloud, Collaboration & Data Center Intelligence
gist: A TechInsights product page (built on Synergy Research Group's cloud/data-center market data) promoting quarterly market-share tracking of hyperscalers and data-center networking. Promotional, but it names the specific structural transitions it tracks: 400G to 800G data-center interconnect and liquid cooling for AI infrastructure.

insights.claim: Data-center switching, routing, and interconnect markets are in an active transition from 400G to 800G port speeds, a shift TechInsights tracks at the silicon level.
insights.speaker: TechInsights
insights.so_what: The 400G to 800G transition is a near-term demand driver for switch-silicon and optical-interconnect suppliers; track port-shipment mix as the signal.
insights.quote: including 400G and 800G transition dynamics and silicon-level insights.

insights.claim: Liquid cooling is modeled as an emerging adoption curve tied specifically to AI infrastructure and GPU-cluster buildouts.
insights.speaker: TechInsights
insights.so_what: Liquid cooling adoption is a leading indicator of AI-cluster density; rising attach rates favor thermal-management suppliers.
insights.quote: scenario modelling for emerging technology adoption curves including AI infrastructure and liquid cooling.

insights.claim: Hyperscale cloud infrastructure market share is tracked by revenue and capacity across AWS, Azure, Google, and Meta, including infrastructure-buildout trends.
insights.speaker: TechInsights
insights.so_what: Capacity-buildout and share data on the top four hyperscalers is a proxy for capex direction across the AI/cloud supply chain.
insights.quote: tracking the world's largest cloud providers, AWS, Azure, Google, Meta, and beyond

insights.claim: Detailed quarterly cloud and data-center data is published 5-8 weeks after quarter close, with five-year forward forecasts refreshed every six months.
insights.speaker: TechInsights
insights.so_what: The 5-8 week post-quarter cadence sets the freshness ceiling on third-party cloud share data for modeling.
insights.quote: Highly detailed quarterly data is available 5–8 weeks after quarter close
